title: AlphaSense Tops $700 Million in Annual Recurring Revenue, Takes IPO Steps
summary: AlphaSense, which sells AI-powered search and market research tools to banks and other businesses, has been working with advisers on a potential initial public offering in the coming months, according to people with direct knowledge of its plans.
